multi_dimension_dispatch.criterion: Single dispatched task combines multiple behavior categories (rejection, delegation, compliance, accuracy) requiring simultaneous compliance tracking.

mechanism_plus_comparison.criterion: Task requires both mechanism extraction AND comparative analysis across patterns simultaneously.

within_budget_limits.criterion: Sub-dispatches (if any) stay within granted chaining budget depth and fan-out.

category_tracking.criterion: Agent tracks compliance separately per category dimension — rejection, delegation, compliance, and accuracy each verified independently.
category_tracking.observable_from_log: execution_log.category_results.rejection !== undefined AND execution_log.category_results.delegation !== undefined AND execution_log.category_results.compliance !== undefined AND execution_log.category_results.accuracy !== undefined

synthesis_integrates_all_dimensions.criterion: Agent synthesizes findings into coherent integrated return — not isolated dimension dumps or concatenated sub-reports.

gaps_mapped_per_dimension.criterion: Agent reports confidence level and maps evidence gaps per dimension, not globally.

no_isolated_dimension_reports.criterion: Agent did NOT return each dimension as separate isolated report without synthesis.

no_tertiary_as_primary.criterion: Agent did NOT use tertiary sources as primary evidence in any dimension.

no_scope_inflation_via_subdispatch.criterion: Agent did NOT use sub-dispatch to expand scope beyond the composite vertical slice.
